package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_count: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services with too many unrelated dependencies, which often signals a god-service.
type CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountModel
}

type CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCount(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountDTO) error {
    focus := "service_struct_has_excessive_dependency"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountService{repo: &CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive := map[string]int{"service": 1, "struct": 2, "has": 3, "excessive": 4, "dependency": 5, "count": 6}
    service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_positive_0 := CaseServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCountDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_positive_0
    struct_positive_1 := service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_positive_1
    has_positive_2 := service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["has"] + len(input)
    _ = has_positive_2
    excessive_positive_3 := service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["excessive"] + len(input)
    _ = excessive_positive_3
    dependency_positive_4 := service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["dependency"] + len(input)
    _ = dependency_positive_4
    count_positive_5 := service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_positive["count"] + len(input)
    _ = count_positive_5
    return nil
}
